title: Object 400
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Object 400: "Work Juice"}} ==Description== {{Blurimage|file=WorkingJuice.jpeg|caption=An image taken of Work Juice found in an unknown level.}} "'''Work Juice'''" appears as a standard, 12-ounce, white, ceramic mug filled with a dark, opaque liquid resembling black coffee. The mug is plain, with no observable markings or branding, and the liquid maintains a constant temperature of exactly 165°F (74°C). The liquid does not evaporate and refills itself automatically whenever it is empty. Found exclusively within [[Level 4]], this object's primary anomalous property activates upon consumption. The liquid, despite its appearance, smells faintly of almonds and vanilla, a key indicator of its unique properties, though it lacks the texture and specific taste of typical [[Object 1|Almond Water]]. Upon drinking "'''Work Juice'''" the consumer experiences an immediate and profound surge of mental clarity and energy. Fatigue, hunger, and dehydration are temporarily nullified for a period of about eight hours. Subjects report feeling highly motivated and focused, capable of performing complex tasks without error or distraction. This effect makes the object highly sought after by various [[Groups]] for sustained exploration and resource gathering. However, the effects are not without consequence. After the eight-hour period, the consumer experiences a significant decline in their condition, resulting in a state of extreme weariness and heightened unease. This period of recovery can last up to twelve hours, leaving the individual susceptible to the dangers of the Backrooms, like entities or phenomena. Using "'''Work Juice'''" too frequently (less than 24 hours between uses) can lead to a build-up of negative effects on the user's mental state, potentially causing confusion and difficulty in perceiving their surroundings accurately. Due to its potent, albeit temporary, utility, the [[M.E.G.]] has cataloged "'''Work Juice'''" for emergency use only. Protocols dictate that any user must be monitored and quarantined during the post-effect recovery period. The self-refilling nature of the mug means it is a stable, infinite resource, though caution is highly advised due to the significant strain its after-effects impose. ==Addendum== There are three different main types of '''Work Juice'''. They are shown in the table below: {| class="article-table" |+ Work Juice types ! Type of Work Juice!! Effect |- | Cocoa || It has been observed that this type of '''Work Juice''' is the most efficient one. This type seems to also be the most common type, being found near offices on [[Level 4]]. |- | Decaf|| This is the second most common type of '''Work Juice'''. This type provides an immediate sense of calm, negating anxiety, stress, and paranoia for six hours. It is highly effective in restoring sanity in particularly harrowing levels. |- | "Espres"(Short for Espresso) || This is the least common type of '''Work Juice'''. This type provides a powerful, concentrated dose that provides heightened physical strength, speed, and reaction time for a limited duration of just thirty minutes. Consumers can temporarily evade even the fastest entities. |} __NOTOC__ [[Category:Objects]] {{Collapse|initial='''> Open Author & Licensing Information'''|final='''> Close Author & Licensing Information'''|body=
